metadata.title: Zümra Academy | Online Language Education for Women
metadata.description: Zümra Academy offers a safe, high-quality and fully online language learning experience designed for women.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you requested does not exist.
notFound.help: Check the address or return to the home page.

reasons.lesson_not_open_yet: The lesson hasn't started yet. Joining opens shortly before the lesson time.
reasons.lesson_meeting_not_ready: The meeting isn't ready yet. Try again shortly.
reasons.google_account_required: Link your Google account from your profile first.
reasons.generic: You can't join the lesson right now.

emptyState.title: Coming Soon
emptyState.description: This module is currently being prepared.

publicAssessment.title: See where you are and make your next step clear.
publicAssessment.description: Complete a short assessment, discover your level and request a consultation with our expert advisors if you wish.
publicAssessment.genericError: The action could not be completed right now. Check your information and try again.
publicAssessment.expired: Your seven-day continuation period has expired. You can start a new assessment.

start.title: First, let us get to know you.
start.description: These details create your candidate record and let you begin immediately.
start.consent: I consent to the processing of my information for candidacy, level assessment and communication. If I am under 18, I confirm that I provide this information with my guardian's knowledge and approval.
start.marketing: I would like to receive news and announcements by email.
start.privacyNote: Your email is not used to create an account. It is added to your candidate profile for communication and application tracking.

profile.title: Your result is ready.
profile.description: Complete your contact information to unlock your result and see the most useful next step.

result.title: Your current level is {level}
result.description: This demo assessment provides an initial indication of your level. A consultation helps define the right program for your goals.

appointment.title: Choose three times that suit you.
appointment.description: These are availability preferences, not confirmed appointments. Our advisor will use them to plan with you.
appointment.successDescription: Our advisor team will review your availability and contact you.
appointment.alreadyExists: You already have a pending consultation request; our team will contact you.

emptyDashboard.description: When the real modules are ready, they will open inside the same workspace shell, animation system and role-based data model.

journey.title: Journey
journey.notePlaceholder: Leave a note for the team...
journey.noOtherAdvisors: No other advisor to transfer to.
journey.transferError: Advisor transfer failed. Please try again.

profilePhoto.hint: Tap the photo to change it
profilePhoto.error: Could not upload the photo, try again.

profileSettings.title: My Profile
profileSettings.description: Manage your photo and account details here.

hero.description: Move at your own pace in our safe women-only online environment; focus on your goals and build your language skills with confidence. Flexible schedules and expert instructors create a fresh learning experience.
hero.quoteDescription: A purely supportive, women-exclusive space designed to amplify your voice.

why.title: Forget traditional courses.
why.description: At Zümra Academy, learning is not a technical obligation. It is a safe, joyful and personal growth journey.

cards.title: A Safe Space for Women
cards.description: A women-only online learning environment where you can feel comfortable, learn without judgment and build confidence without unnecessary stress.

cards.title: Flexible Hours
cards.description: Join from home, at the time that fits your life. Camera-off participation keeps the experience fully compatible with your rhythm.

cards.title: Active Speaking Practice
cards.description: Lessons focused on real communication, not endless grammar rules. With small groups and one-to-one support, you do not just learn the language, you use it.

how.description: From day one, you know exactly what to expect. No surprises, only focused steps toward your goal.

steps.title: Pre-Registration & First Contact
steps.desc: Fill out the form. We will contact you within 24 hours to plan the next step.

steps.title: Free Level Assessment
steps.desc: A short, relaxed 15-minute evaluation to understand your current level.

steps.title: Your Personalized Program
steps.desc: Together, we define the roadmap that fits your level and your goals.

steps.title: Start Live Lessons
steps.desc: Join live classes on safe platforms with flexible scheduling.

steps.title: Progress Tracking
steps.desc: Stay motivated with monthly progress reports and clear feedback.

languages.title: Choose the language that fits you.
languages.description: One-to-one and group options across 8 languages.

items.title: General English
items.desc: Designed for women who want to speak confidently in everyday life. Practice-first and goal-oriented.

items.title: Academic English
items.desc: Academic writing, presentation and exam skills for university and professional goals.

items.title: English Speaking Club
items.desc: Keep your speaking skills active through a supportive and social practice environment.

items.title: Business English
items.desc: Improve email writing, presentations and meeting communication for work life.

cta.title: Not sure which program is right for you?
cta.description: After a short free consultation with our expert advisors, we will create a route designed around your goals.
cta.whatsappMessage: Hello, I'd like to get information about your programs.

leadForm.callbackSubtitle: Leave your number and our advisor will call you back shortly.
leadForm.languageLabel: Which language do you want to learn?
leadForm.consent: I have read and accept the personal data processing notice.
leadForm.marketingConsent: I'd like to receive campaigns and announcements.
leadForm.successText: Our advisor will contact you shortly.
leadForm.errorText: Could not send. Please try again.

errors.invalidPhone: The phone number looks invalid. Please check it.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.

instructors.title: An inspiring team of strong women educators.
instructors.description: Meet our elite instructors, each an expert in her field with strong academic experience. They teach language and also mentor your growth.

items.name: Elif A.
items.text: Being able to feel comfortable without turning on the camera mattered a lot to me. I genuinely found the courage to speak in class.

items.name: Selin K.
items.text: Everything is planned and I get clear feedback every month. Knowing what I am doing keeps my motivation high.

items.name: Hande N.
items.text: My instructor noticed my gaps very quickly. The practice analysis system helped me feel stronger and closer to my goal.

items.name: Nil T.
items.text: The lessons are very smooth. The content matched my goal, and I built a speaking habit in a short time. Zümra is the best.

faq.title: Let's clarify what you are wondering.
faq.description: For more questions, feel free to reach us through our WhatsApp line.

items.a: Yes. Every month, we offer free demo lessons for those who want to try our group classes. We also organize seminars to support motivation.
All materials are provided on our online platform. We support your learning with practical and interactive content for daily and professional life.

items.q: Which platform are lessons held on?
items.a: Lessons are held live and interactively on Zoom or Google Meet. A computer or tablet is enough.

items.q: Can I join without a camera?
items.a: Absolutely. To help women feel fully comfortable, students may join lessons with audio only if they prefer.

footer.description: Türkiye's first women-only online language academy. Learn at your own pace, reach your goal and speak with the world.

storage.title: Storage & File Care
storage.description: Manage disk usage of uploaded files and clean up wasted space.
storage.orphansHint: These files aren't linked to any message, assignment or profile — safe to delete.
storage.noOrphans: No orphan files — everything is in use 🎉
storage.deleteFailed: The file could not be deleted. Please try again.
storage.fileNotReady: File isn't ready yet (still processing or unavailable), so it couldn't be downloaded.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.description: Branch lessons, private lessons and future appointments are separated by color in one calendar.
calendar.hoverHint: Tap or hover over days on the calendar to see details.
calendar.absenceNotePlaceholder: Add a short note if you want
calendar.emptyDescription: Sessions will appear here once lesson schedules are created for branches.
calendar.noEventsInMonth: No calendar items are planned for this month.
calendar.endLessonConfirm: Are you sure you want to end this lesson? The join link will close.
calendar.endLessonError: Could not end the lesson. Try again.

lessonStatus.newTimePlaceholder: Pick a new date and time (Istanbul time)

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: System tools for the admin panel and development environment.

runtimeSettings.title: Lesson & join settings
runtimeSettings.description: Configure the join window and auto-close times here.
runtimeSettings.joinLeadMinutesHint: Students and teachers can join this many minutes before the lesson.
runtimeSettings.lessonAutoCloseHoursHint: The lesson auto-closes this many hours after its start time.
runtimeSettings.error: Could not save settings. Try again.
runtimeSettings.loadError: Could not load settings. Try again.
runtimeSettings.installmentReminderDaysHint: How many days before the due date students get reminded
runtimeSettings.paymentReviewStaleDaysHint: Warn staff when a payment report stays unreviewed this many days
runtimeSettings.lessonChangeCutoffHoursHint: How many hours before a lesson students can still request a cancel/postpone (0 = no limit)

mailMode.title: Mail delivery mode
mailMode.description: Choose where system mail (invites, verification codes, notifications) is sent. Applies instantly, no restart needed.

live.label: Live
live.hint: Delivered to real email addresses over real SMTP.

test.label: Test (Mailpit)
test.hint: Not delivered; captured in the Mailpit inbox. Read verification codes and invites there.

mailMode.note: In test mode mail is never delivered to real recipients; it is captured in the Mailpit inbox (served at /mail/ on the live server).
mailMode.error: Could not update mail mode. Try again.

devReset.title: Reset data
devReset.description: Clears candidates, students, enrollments, instructors, branches, programs, invitations, notifications, audit logs and media records. The assessment question bank, current admin user and active session are preserved.
devReset.disabled: This reset tool is currently disabled.
devReset.warning: This cannot be undone. Use it to clear local test data.
devReset.invalidConfirmation: The confirmation text does not match.
devReset.success: Data was reset. Your admin account and this session were preserved.
devReset.error: The reset could not be completed. Check your password and session authorization, then try again.

errors.forbidden: This action requires an active admin session.
errors.invalidRequest: The request is invalid. Check the password and confirmation text.
errors.passwordFailed: The admin password could not be verified.
errors.resetFailed: The reset could not be completed. The terminal log may contain the technical error.

backgroundJobs.title: Background jobs
backgroundJobs.description: Monitor worker-driven jobs such as mail and Meet here. If the worker is offline, invitations and meeting links stay queued.
backgroundJobs.noHeartbeat: No worker heartbeat has been received yet. Check whether `npm run worker` is running.
backgroundJobs.statusError: Background job status could not be read.

programs.title: Programs
programs.description: Manage education packages and private lesson student sales rates.
programs.formDescription: A program defines the sold package; opened student groups are connected as branches.
programs.branchFormDescription: A branch is a student class opened under a group program for a date range and capacity.
programs.systemProgramNote: Only the active status of this system program can be changed.
programs.privateDescription: A system program priced during enrollment by instructor, language and purchased hours.
programs.lifecycleError: The action could not be completed. The record may be in use or required details may be missing.
programs.programDeleted: The unused program was permanently deleted.
programs.branchArchived: The branch was archived and student transfers were completed.
programs.branchDeleted: The unused branch was permanently deleted.
programs.archiveProgramConfirm: Are you sure you want to archive this program?
programs.deleteProgramConfirm: This unused program will be permanently deleted. Continue?
programs.deleteBranchConfirm: This unused branch will be permanently deleted. Continue?
programs.archiveProgramBranchesFirst: The program could not be archived. Archive its active branches first.

programs.capacityOverrideApproval: I approve transferring this student above the target branch capacity.
programs.branchHasNoStudents: The branch has no active or paused students and can be archived directly.
programs.saveError: The action could not be completed. Check the fields and try again.

programs.rateDisclaimer: This amount is not instructor salary or compensation; it is the sales price charged to the student.

programs.perHour: Hourly price charged to the student

programs.noTeachers: Create an active instructor profile before defining a rate.
programs.noBranches: No branch or class has been created yet.

programs.scheduleDescription: Lesson duration is fixed at 60 minutes. Weekly repeat creates lessons across the branch date range.
programs.scheduleSaved: Lesson schedule saved and calendar sessions were created.
programs.scheduleError: The lesson schedule could not be saved. Check the date, time and branch instructor.
programs.scheduleNeedsInstructor: Assign an active instructor to the branch before creating a lesson schedule.

programs.schedulePlannerDescription: For weekly repeat, choose the weekday and time. For manual planning, set the time and click days on the calendar to add lessons.

programs.manualLessonsEmpty: When weekly repeat is off, add lesson dates one by one.

branchErrors.instructorMismatch: The selected teacher has no active language competency covering this program's language and all of its levels. Add the competency on the teacher's profile, or save the branch without a teacher for now.
branchErrors.groupProgramOnly: Branches can only be created for group programs; the selected program is a one-to-one program.
branchErrors.invalidFields: Invalid dates or capacity: the end date can't be before the start date and maximum capacity can't be below the minimum.

programs.branchTeacherHint: Only teachers holding a competency for the program's language covering all of its levels can be assigned. Competencies are managed on the Teachers page.
programs.branchTeacherNoneCompatible: No teacher has a competency matching this program. Add the language/levels on the Teachers page; you can save the branch without a teacher for now.
programs.rateLanguageHint: Rates can only be set for teachers with a competency in the selected language.

rateErrors.languageMismatch: The selected teacher has no active competency for this language. Add it on the Teachers page.
rateErrors.invalidRate: The rate is invalid. Check the hourly amount.

programs.scheduleHistoryHint: Taught and past lessons survive schedule changes; a new plan only updates future lessons.

packages.title: One-on-One Lesson Packages
packages.description: Main packages: total price and hourly rate defined together; picking one in the wizard fills hours and price automatically

students.title: Students
students.description: {count} students are managed in the system.
students.emptyDescription: Students will appear here after a candidate enrollment is completed.

timelineNotes.speakingPractice: The student was highly successful in everyday speaking practice. Vocabulary variety is improving noticeably. There are still small mistakes with past tense usage, which will be reinforced.
timelineNotes.grammarFocus: The student understood the grammar structure, but had some difficulty turning it into speech. An additional reading passage was sent.

studentDetail.lesson12Note: The student was highly successful in everyday speaking practice. Vocabulary variety is improving noticeably. There are still small mistakes with past tense usage, which will be reinforced.

leads.title: Candidates

enrollment.title: Student Enrollment
enrollment.saveError: This step could not be saved. Check the required fields.
enrollment.completed: Student enrollment completed and the panel invitation was sent.
enrollment.incomplete: Enrollment could not be completed. Check missing or inconsistent fields.

stepDescriptions.1: Identity numbers are encrypted and only shown in masked form.
stepDescriptions.2: At least one guardian is required for students under 18.
stepDescriptions.3: Select the purchased program. For private lessons, language, instructor and hours determine the price.
stepDescriptions.4: The original source is preserved and any operational correction is stored separately.
stepDescriptions.5: Specify whether enrollment was completed through the website, phone, WhatsApp, video call or another channel.
stepDescriptions.6: Attach identity, passport, receipt and contract files to private media storage.
stepDescriptions.7: All amounts are stored in TRY with kuruş precision.
stepDescriptions.8: Group schedules may be inherited; private lesson schedules can be completed later.
stepDescriptions.9: Review missing information and complete the conversion in one transaction.

fields.leaveBlankToKeep: Leave blank to keep the existing masked value
fields.correctedSourcePlaceholder: Enter an operational source correction if needed
fields.discountNotePlaceholder: Optionally record the reason for the discount
fields.schedulePlaceholder: Suitable days, time ranges or notes for the instructor...
fields.confirmationPasswordPlaceholder: Enter your password to confirm this critical action

enrollment.originalSourceHelp: This value comes from the candidate's original inquiry and cannot be changed in order to preserve history.

enrollment.branchScheduleInherited: The lesson schedule is inherited from the selected branch. You can print it or save it as PDF from the browser to share with the student.
enrollment.branchScheduleMissing: This branch does not have a lesson schedule yet.
enrollment.branchCapacityWarning: The selected branch has reached maximum capacity. Enrollment can continue only with an explicit capacity override.

enrollment.privateLessonRateNote: The hourly amount is not instructor compensation; it is the private lesson sales rate charged to the student.
enrollment.noPrivateLessonRate: No active instructor sales rate is available for this language.

discovery.title: Demo / Trial Lessons
discovery.description: Schedule discovery lessons, manage their fees and track candidates here.
discovery.createAccountHint: An activation email is sent; the account closes 7 days after the lesson. It becomes permanent on enrollment.
discovery.scheduleError: Could not schedule. Check the details.
discovery.errorAccountExists: This candidate already has an active account.
discovery.errorInvitationPending: An invitation is already pending for this candidate.
discovery.errorEmailTaken: An account with this email already exists.
discovery.actionError: The action could not be completed. Try again.
discovery.feesDescription: Set fees per branch or per instructor. An instructor fee overrides the branch fee; unset targets are free.
discovery.feeFreeHint: Enter 0 to make discovery lessons free for that target.
discovery.feeError: Could not save. Check the amount.
discovery.feeListEmpty: No fees defined yet — all discovery lessons are free.

timezoneCard.title: Your timezone
timezoneCard.description: Lesson times across the panel are shown in this timezone. Lessons are scheduled in Istanbul time; this setting only changes the display.

chat.title: Messages
chat.emptyDescription: Your conversations appear here once there's an active relationship.
chat.emptyThread: Start the conversation — send the first message.
chat.error: Could not send the message. Try again.
chat.voiceError: Voice recording could not be uploaded. Try again.

assignments.title: My Assignments
assignments.description: Track the assignments and materials your teacher shares with you.
assignments.emptyDescription: When your teacher shares an assignment or material, it will appear here.

submit.title: Submit your assignment
submit.empty: Please write something or attach a file.
submit.error: Could not save your submission. Try again.
submit.attachmentProcessing: The file is still processing, try again in a few seconds.
submit.locked: Submission is closed because the assignment has been graded.

dashboard.encouragement: You are doing great, keep going!

lessons.title: My Lessons
lessons.description: Track your upcoming and completed lessons here.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.missingProfileDescription: This student account is not linked to a student profile yet.

changeRequest.pending: Your request is awaiting teacher approval
changeRequest.error: The request could not be sent. Try again.
changeRequest.errorCutoff: The request window has closed: the lesson starts too soon.
changeRequest.errorPending: You already have a pending request for this lesson.

calendar.hoverHint: Tap or hover over days to see lesson details.
calendar.absenceNotePlaceholder: Add a short note if you want
calendar.legendTitle: Lesson types are separated by color.
calendar.emptyDescription: Your lessons will appear here once the branch schedule is created.
calendar.noEventsInMonth: No lessons are planned for this month.

progressPage.title: Progress
progressPage.emptyDescription: Your progress will appear here as lessons and assignments accumulate.
progressPage.readyToAdvance: You're ready for the next level! 🎉

messages.title: Messages
messages.description: Advisor and instructor messages will appear here.

googleAccount.title: Connected Accounts
googleAccount.description: Use your Google account only for faster, secure sign-in.
googleAccount.linkedSuccess: Your Google account was connected securely.
googleAccount.unlinkedSuccess: The Google account connection was removed.
googleAccount.actionError: The action could not be completed. Check your password and the email address on your Google account, then try again.

payments.title: My Payments
payments.description: Your installment plan, the account to pay into, and your payment history
payments.empty: You have no course enrollments yet
payments.noAccount: Account details are not set yet — you can contact your advisor
payments.reportHint: Fill this in after making your transfer; it becomes final once your teacher confirms it with the receipt.
payments.alreadyReported: You already have a pending report for this installment
payments.errorGeneric: The operation failed, please try again.
payments.noInstallments: Your installment plan is not ready yet

dashboard.title: Advisor Panel
dashboard.description: The base CRM shell is ready for assigned candidates, students, meetings and offers.
dashboard.realDescription: One view of the candidate pool, appointments and enrollments.

leads.title: My Candidates
leads.description: The candidate pool assigned to this advisor will be managed here with the CRM flow.

students.title: My Students
students.description: Student profiles, offers, meetings and follow-up flow for this advisor will live here.

meetings.title: Meetings
meetings.description: Links, QR codes, reminders and meeting statuses will be managed in this module.

offers.title: Offers
offers.description: The offer flow sent to students through email and WhatsApp will be prepared here.

messages.title: Messages
messages.description: Student and candidate communication history will be collected here in a single flow.

settings.title: Advisor Settings
settings.description: Notification preferences, working hours and profile settings will be managed here.

meetings.title: Consultations
meetings.description: Schedule appointment requests and record outcomes.

offers.title: Offers
offers.description: Candidates at the offer stage and unfinished enrollments.
offers.emptyTitle: No one at the offer desk
offers.emptyDescription: Candidates reaching the offer stage will appear here.

tasks.title: My Tasks
tasks.description: Claim work from the pool and run your day from here.
tasks.poolEmpty: Pool is empty; every lead has an owner. 👏
tasks.taken: Another advisor just claimed this task.
tasks.newHint: Add a personal to-do (e.g. preparing a presentation).
tasks.privacyNote: Personal tasks are visible only to you and admins.

payments.title: Payments
payments.description: Your students' installment plans and payment records
payments.commissionMissing: No commission rate is defined for this record — an admin must set it on the Commissions screen.
payments.errorGeneric: The operation failed, please try again.
payments.planLockedRow: An installment with payments cannot be removed; its amount cannot go below what was paid
payments.planEmpty: No installment plan — start by adding a row
payments.receiptUploadError: Receipt upload failed, please try again.

googleAccount.title: Connected Accounts
googleAccount.description: Use your Google account only for faster, secure sign-in.
googleAccount.linkedSuccess: Your Google account was connected securely.
googleAccount.unlinkedSuccess: The Google account connection was removed.
googleAccount.actionError: The action could not be completed. Check your password and the email address on your Google account, then try again.

assignments.title: Assignments
assignments.description: Create assignments and materials, grade submissions.
assignments.emptyDescription: Tap New assignment to create your first assignment or material.

create.title: New assignment
create.description: Pick a branch or student, share an assignment or material.
create.error: Could not create the assignment. Try again.
create.errorProcessing: An attachment is still processing. Try again in a few seconds.

grading.materialRecipients: This material was shared with {count} students.
grading.feedbackHint: Write a short feedback for the student...
grading.scoreRange: Score must be a whole number between 0 and {max}.
grading.shareError: Could not share in chat. Try again.

dashboard.description: The teacher workspace shell is ready for lessons, students, calendar and messaging.

dashboard.branchesDescription: These branches will connect to the calendar in the scheduling phase.
dashboard.studentsDescription: Students coming from branch and private lesson links.
dashboard.noBranches: No branch has been assigned yet.
dashboard.noStudents: No active student is linked to this instructor yet.

studentDetail.description: The student's course progress: attendance, lesson history, assignment grades and your evaluation.
studentDetail.evaluationDescription: Shown on the student's progress screen with your name.
studentDetail.evaluationPlaceholder: Your note about the student's overall development...
studentDetail.evaluationHint: Save with an empty note to remove the evaluation.

students.title: Students
students.description: Active and paused students linked to {name}.
students.missingProfileDescription: This teacher account is not linked to an instructor profile yet.
students.emptyDescription: Students will appear here once a branch or private lesson enrollment is completed.

calendar.missingProfileDescription: This teacher account is not linked to an instructor profile yet.

changeRequests.title: Lesson change requests
changeRequests.error: The action could not be completed. Try again.
changeRequests.errorConflict: Another lesson clashes with the selected time.
changeRequests.errorTimeRequired: Pick a valid new time for the postponement.

calendar.emptyDescription: Sessions will appear here once a lesson schedule is defined for a branch.
calendar.hoverHint: Tap or hover over days to see lesson details.
calendar.absenceNotePlaceholder: Add a short note if you want
calendar.legendTitle: Lesson types are separated by color.
calendar.noEventsInMonth: No lessons are planned for this month.
calendar.endLessonConfirm: Are you sure you want to end this lesson? The join link will close.

attendance.noStudents: No students are assigned to this lesson.

messages.title: Messages

profile.title: Profile

settings.title: Teacher Settings

payments.title: Payments
payments.description: Pending payment reports, your account and commission rates
payments.confirmHint: The student declared {amount}. Enter what actually arrived and upload the receipt.
payments.mismatchNote: If it differs from the declaration, explain how
payments.receiptHint: You can upload a PDF or an image
payments.commissionMissing: Your commission rate is not defined yet — contact the administration.
payments.unsettledHint: Total to be handed to the institution in cash
payments.noBank: No IBAN on file — contact the administration
payments.errorGeneric: The operation failed, please try again.

login.title: Sign in to the workspace
login.description: Start a secure session with your Zümra account.
login.googleError: This Google account could not be used to sign in. If you have a Zümra account, sign in with your username and password, then connect Google from your profile.
login.rateLimited: Too many verification requests were sent. Please try again in a few minutes.
login.error: Your sign-in details could not be verified.

googleCompletion.title: Verifying your Google account
googleCompletion.description: Keep this window open while the secure connection is completed.
googleCompletion.pending: Your Google account and Zümra membership are being verified...
googleCompletion.error: The Google action could not be completed. Redirecting you to sign in.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Enter the email address associated with your account. If it exists, a secure reset link will be sent.
forgotPassword.success: If this email is registered, a reset link has been sent.
forgotPassword.error: The request could not be completed right now. Please try again later.

resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.description: Create a new password with at least 12 characters.
resetPassword.sameAsCurrent: Your new password must be different from your current password.
resetPassword.success: Your password has been updated. Redirecting to sign in.
resetPassword.error: The link is invalid, already used, or expired.

activation.title: Activate your account
activation.description: Set a password of at least 12 characters to complete your invitation.
activation.error: The invitation link is invalid or has expired.
activation.accountExists: An account already exists for this email address. Please sign in or ask your administrator for a new invitation.
activation.forbidden: This request could not be completed for security reasons. Please reopen the link from the same site.
activation.invalidPassword: Your password must be between 12 and 128 characters.
activation.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again shortly.
activation.success: Your account is active. Redirecting to sign in.

device.title: Verify this device
device.description: Enter the six-digit code sent to your email. This device will remain trusted for 30 days.
device.error: The code is invalid or has expired.
device.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.
device.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
device.restart: Verification could not start. Restart sign-in on this device.

mfa.title: Two-step verification
mfa.description: Enter the current code from your authenticator app.
mfa.error: The code could not be verified.

mfaSetup.title: Set up admin MFA
mfaSetup.description: Configure authenticator verification before opening the admin workspace. Recovery codes are shown only once.
mfaSetup.error: MFA setup could not be completed.

unauthorized.title: Access could not be verified
unauthorized.description: The required role or security verification is missing for this workspace.
unauthorized.help: Refresh your session or contact your system administrator.

privateLesson.title: Create private lesson
privateLesson.description: Schedule a lesson for your 1:1 student — single or weekly recurring.
privateLesson.noStudents: You have no active 1:1 students to schedule for.
privateLesson.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
privateLesson.errorDate: Please pick a date and time.
privateLesson.conflictIntro: Some dates clash. Change the conflicting lessons:
privateLesson.conflictTeacher: The teacher already has a lesson at this time.
privateLesson.conflictStudent: The student already has a lesson at this time.
privateLesson.conflictSelf: This lesson clashes with another one in the list.
